one_line: A Neolithic-Chalcolithic village farmer and early healer from Mehrgarh on the Kachi Plain.

appearance.age_look: mid-20s, lean and wiry from field work
appearance.face: oval face with strong cheekbones, medium-brown complexion tanned by sun, straight nose, dark almond-shaped anime eyes, a few faint freckles and fine laugh-lines, default expression calm and focused with a hint of curiosity.
appearance.hair: thick, straight, dark brown-black hair gathered into a low, short ponytail at the nape with a simple twisted plant-fibre cord, front kept neat with a narrow plain headband made from undyed woven cloth.
appearance.costume: a knee-length undyed off-white woven cotton or flax tunic with elbow-length sleeves and a simple V-slit neck, belted at the waist with a braided plant-fibre cord in dull brown; over it a soft, light ochre woolen shawl draped from left shoulder across torso and wrapped around the back; simple straight ankle-length dark earth-brown wrap skirt or kilt tied securely at the waist, with subtle vertical weaving texture; bare lower arms but modestly covered torso and legs; feet in simple dark leather sandals with wraparound thongs; accessories include a short string of small pale turquoise-blue and beige stone beads at the neck and one thicker dark-brown shell bracelet on the right wrist.
appearance.signature: a smooth, reddish-brown wooden digging stick almost as tall as himself, its tip hardened and slightly darkened from use, with a small leather pouch tied near the top containing tiny drilled stone and tooth beads hinting at early healing tools.

ref_desc: Mehrgarh Farmer-Healer is a lean, sun-browned young adult with dark almond eyes, low ponytailed dark hair and cloth headband, wearing an off-white tunic, ochre shawl, earth-brown wrap skirt, bead necklace, sandals, and carrying a tall reddish-brown digging stick with a small pouch.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Mehrgarh Farmer-Healer: a lean, mid-20s villager from Neolithic-Chalcolithic Mehrgarh with medium-brown sun-tanned skin, oval face, straight nose, and dark almond-shaped eyes, wearing a calm, focused expression. His thick dark brown-black hair is gathered into a low, short ponytail at the nape, held with a simple plant-fibre cord, and a narrow undyed woven cloth headband keeps the front neat. He wears a knee-length, off-white woven tunic with elbow-length sleeves and a small V-slit neck, belted with a braided dull-brown plant-fibre cord, over which a light ochre woolen shawl is draped from his left shoulder across his torso and around his back. His lower body is covered by a straight, ankle-length earth-brown wrap skirt or kilt tied securely at the waist, the cloth showing subtle vertical weaving texture, and his feet are in simple dark leather sandals with wraparound thongs. Add a short necklace of small pale turquoise-blue and beige stone beads at the neck and a single dark-brown shell bracelet on his right wrist. In his right hand he carries his signature reddish-brown wooden digging stick, nearly as tall as he is, with a slightly darkened tip from use and a small leather pouch tied near the top containing tiny drilled beads. Use a muted palette of off-white, light ochre, earth brown, reddish brown, and pale turquoise blue, and show him from multiple angles to clearly display face, hair, clothing, and the digging stick.
